headline: Implied Volatility Surging for Bunge Global Stock Options
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to BG stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Jim Cramer on Bunge Global: “I Don’t Want You to Buy More, I Want You to Hold on to It”
summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE:BG) is one of the stocks on which Jim Cramer expressed his thoughts. Mentioning that it is a long-term holding, a caller asked whether they should add to their position or hold it. Cramer stated: I don’t want you to buy more. I don’t want you to buy more. headline: Assessing Bunge Global (BG) Valuation After 2026 Investor Day Buyback And Capital Return Plans
summary: Bunge Global (BG) is back in focus after its 2026 Investor Day, where management paired an updated earnings baseline with a new US$3b share buyback and a firm capital return commitment. See our latest analysis for Bunge Global. The share price has gained 30.9% over the past 90 days and the 1 year total shareholder return of 65.9% points to building momentum around Bunge Global’s buyback plans and capital return commitments. If this kind of capital return story has your attention, it could be...
